projectDescription: A soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access that runs 24/7 from the CLI or Telegram.
keyFeatures: Permission-hardened tool execution with folder-level scoping and shell blocklist
Soul-driven personality via user-owned markdown files (soul.md, persona.md, taste.md, heartbeat.md)
Daily token budget enforcement with auto-concise mode and budget commands
Multi-channel access via CLI (readline + streaming) and Telegram (HTML formatting, file uploads)
24/7 daemon mode with crash recovery, watchdog, and cross-platform system service install
Extensible skill system based on Agent Skills specification with progressive disclosure
Built-in task scheduler with cron expressions and YAML persistence
Multi-provider LLM support with automatic fallback (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Anthropic, Grok, Ollama)
Three-tier memory system: short-term, long-term facts, and episodic memory
publicApiSurface: mercury start / mercury up / mercury stop / mercury restart
mercury doctor / mercury setup / mercury status / mercury logs
read_file, write_file, create_file, edit_file, list_dir, delete_file, send_file
git_status, git_diff, git_log, git_add, git_commit, git_push
